reviews.review_description: When I launch the game I see the title in the distance.  The title bar disapears and nothing else is loading.  Uninstalled, and then reinstalled and the same happens, game does not load.

Please explain what this creature supposed to do apart from walking around and repeating lines over and over again.
Please update it and I will review it properly.
5 quid wasted at the moment.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback, and we're really sorry for the frustration you've experienced. We totally understand how it feels when things don't meet your expectations, especially when you're excited to try something new.

To clarify, MagicPals is still in Early Access, and we're actively working on improving and expanding the game. Here's what we're working on and what's coming next:

All the dialogues in the game are powered by a large AI model, which means Lumi (your pet) can remember things over time and learn more about you. Imagine Lumi as a true companion—it will get to know you better as you interact with it.
The game is designed to be played using your hands (rather than a controller), so you can go on adventures, complete fun mini-games, and collect items to decorate your space. It's all about creating a more interactive and engaging experience.
We're planning to continuously update the game, bringing in more pet interactions and expanding the range of pet characters to keep things fresh and exciting.
We truly appreciate your support, and we're committed to making the game better with every update. Please hang in there, and we hope you'll continue to enjoy the journey with Lumi as we evolve the game!
